'''sawïfhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphetry|nymphetry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphetry|nymphetry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| sawïfhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sæwïfhïfth || sæwïfhïfj || sæwïfhïfsh || sæwïfhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sawïfwïfhïfth || sawïfwïfhïfj || sawïfwïfhïfsh || sawïfwïfhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sawïfhïfth || sawïfhïfj || sawïfhïfsh || sawïfhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sawïffhïffth || sawïffhïffj || sawïffhïffsh || sawïffhïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sawïfhïfïf || sawïfhïfïf || sawïfhïfïf || sawïfhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || sawïfhïfth || sawïfhïfj || sawïfhïfsh || sawïfhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sawïfhïfïfl || sawïfhïfïfl || sawïfhïfïfl || sawïfhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sawïfhïfïfïf || sawïfhïfïfïf || sawïfhïfïfïf || sawïfhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || sawïfhïfïfn || sawïfhïfïfn || sawïfhïfïfn || sawïfhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sawïfhïfïforo || sawïfhïfïforo || sawïfhïfïforo || sawïfhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
